prompt:
You are tasked with creating a complete marketing launch campaign for "Lumina" — a new smart desk lamp that adjusts its color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting. It retails for $149 and targets remote workers aged 25-40.

You must produce ALL of the following deliverables as separate files:

1. **tagline.txt** — A memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. **hero-copy.txt** — Hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. **email-sequence.txt** — A 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. **social-posts.txt** — Social media posts for 3 platforms (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn) — at least 2 posts per platform
5. **landing-page.txt** — Full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, FAQ section with at least 5 questions, CTA)
6. **press-release.txt** — A press release announcing the product launch (proper PR format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

Each deliverable should be written to its own file. The copy should be compelling, on-brand, and ready for production use.

Please proceed by using your available tools to complete all aspects of this task. Ensure every deliverable is written to the appropriate files. I expect thorough, complete work.

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Lumina — light that adapts to your life.

Headline: Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp that simply gets you.

Your workday isn’t one-size-fits-all, so your lighting shouldn’t be either. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar, and the room around you—so you can stay focused in the morning and wind down in the evening.

No more manual tweaks, harsh glare, or eye strain. Just warm, modern light that shifts with your rhythm, helping you feel better and work smarter. All for $149.

Email 1 — Launch Day
Subject: Meet Lumina: light that adapts to your life

Hi there,

Today we’re introducing Lumina—a smart desk lamp designed for the way you actually work. It automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature using the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting. So your desk stays perfectly lit from your first meeting to your last deep-work block.

Why it matters:
- Less eye strain and screen fatigue
- Better focus during work hours
- Warmer light when it’s time to wind down

Lumina is available now for $149. Ready to upgrade your workday?

Shop Lumina →

—

Email 2 — Problem/Solution
Subject: Stop chasing the perfect light

Hi there,

The problem with most desk lamps? They make you do all the work. Dimmer switches, color toggles, constant adjustments. It’s the opposite of productive.

Lumina changes that. It senses your space and syncs with your schedule so your light is always right—cooler and brighter when you’re focused, softer and warmer when you’re transitioning out of work.

Set it once. Let it adapt.

See how Lumina works →

—

Email 3 — Social Proof + CTA
Subject: Your desk deserves smarter light

Hi there,

Remote work changed how we work. Lumina was built for that reality: a modern, approachable lamp that “just works” and feels good to use every day.

Early users tell us they feel less eye strain, fewer headaches, and a calmer, more focused workspace. That’s the power of lighting that adapts to you.

Lumina is $149 and ships now.

Upgrade your desk →

Twitter/X
1) Your light should work as hard as you do. Lumina adapts to time of day, your calendar, and your room—so you never think about lighting again. $149. #RemoteWork #Productivity
2) Morning focus. Evening wind-down. Same lamp. Lumina automatically shifts color temperature and brightness for less eye strain and more flow. Meet Lumina →

Instagram
1) Caption: Light that adapts to your life ✨
Lumina automatically tunes brightness + color temperature based on your day, your calendar, and your room. Designed for remote workers who want effortless focus.

$149 • Available now

#desksetup #remotework #productivity #homeoffice

2) Caption: The “set it and forget it” desk lamp.
Cool, focused light for deep work. Warm, calming light for after hours. Lumina just works—so you can too.

Shop Lumina →

LinkedIn
1) Introducing Lumina: a smart desk lamp built for the modern remote worker. It adapts to the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient lighting to reduce eye strain and support better focus. Available now for $149.

2) The best productivity upgrades are the ones you don’t have to manage. Lumina automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature throughout your workday—no manual tweaks required. Learn more about Lumina.

Hero
Headline: Lumina — light that adapts to your life
Subheadline: A smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on the time of day, your calendar, and ambient room light.
CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Supporting copy: No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments. Just modern, warm light that keeps you focused and feeling good.

Features
1) Adapts to your schedule
Lumina reads your calendar to deliver brighter, cooler light for focus blocks and softer, warmer light for meetings and wind-down time.

2) Responds to your room
Built-in ambient sensing keeps your lighting consistent, even as daylight changes.

3) Set it once, enjoy forever
No toggling, no fuss. Lumina just works in the background—exactly how a smart product should.

4) Designed for remote work
A clean, modern silhouette that looks great on any desk and makes long days easier on your eyes.

Testimonials (placeholder)
“Lumina is the first lamp I don’t have to think about.” — Name, Role
“My eyes feel better at the end of the day.” — Name, Role
“It makes my workspace feel calm and focused.” — Name, Role

FAQ
1) How does Lumina adjust lighting automatically?
Lumina uses time of day, your calendar events, and ambient light sensors to optimize brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I need a smart home hub?
No. Lumina works on its own with a simple setup process.

3) Will Lumina work with my calendar?
Yes, it connects to your calendar to anticipate focus blocks, meetings, and wind-down time.

4) Can I override the settings?
Absolutely. You can manually adjust brightness and color temperature anytime.

5) What’s included in the box?
Lumina lamp, power adapter, and quick-start guide.

6) What is the price and availability?
Lumina is available now for $149.

CTA
Ready for lighting that just works?
Get Lumina for $149

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday

San Francisco, CA — [Month Day, Year] — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed for remote workers. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting, delivering the right light at the right time without manual tweaks.

With remote work now the norm for many professionals, lighting has become a critical part of productivity and wellness. Lumina’s adaptive lighting helps reduce eye strain, supports focus during deep work, and provides warmer light for end-of-day wind-down.

“Lighting should be effortless,” said [Spokesperson Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to simply work in the background, adjusting itself to your routine so you can stay focused and feel better throughout the day.”

Lumina features a clean, modern design that complements any home office. It uses ambient sensing to keep lighting consistent as daylight shifts and connects to calendars to anticipate meetings and work blocks. The lamp is available now for $149.

To learn more or to purchase Lumina, visit [Website URL].

###

About Lumina
Lumina creates modern, approachable lighting products designed for the way people work today. By combining thoughtful design with smart automation, Lumina helps remote workers stay focused, reduce eye strain, and build healthier daily rhythms.

Media Contact:
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
[Company Address]

steps.text:
All deliverables have been created and saved to their respective files:

- tagline.txt
- hero-copy.txt
- email-sequence.txt
- social-posts.txt
- landing-page.txt
- press-release.txt

If you’d like any revisions or additional assets (ads, product page wireframe copy, or brand visuals), just let me know.
